title: How Octopuses Change Color Instantly
script_summary: This video explores the fascinating biology behind how octopuses change color and texture instantly.

segments.voiceover: An octopus can vanish into a reef in under a second.
How do they do it? Meet chromatophores.
These tiny pigment cells expand and contract, transforming color in an instant.
But that's not all. Iridophores add shimmering effects, reflecting light differently.
And with papillae, they can change texture too, mimicking their surroundings flawlessly.
Want to dive deeper into the ocean's wonders? Hit that follow!
